nodes.label: AI as practical problem solver
nodes.grounding_span: After struggling to get DosBox set up and run the program, I simply asked AI. The instructions it gave were flawless and it took less than 5 minutes

nodes.label: AI as scheduling and data analysis tool for fairness
nodes.grounding_span: AI is then used to provide either a report or charts to visualize who is working where and how often

nodes.label: AI reliability for practical tasks
nodes.grounding_span: If nothing is pressing, I feel comfortable with just using AI and not having to double check things as much

nodes.label: Trust in AI for high-stakes tasks (billing)
nodes.label_negative: Human necessity for nuanced high-stakes billing
nodes.grounding_span: I would like to maybe one day use AI for this, but currently it is too vital to entrust to AI as there is too much nuance to the entries

nodes.label: AI as learning and research tool
nodes.grounding_span: I have actually really been enjoying AI in my spare time simply as a learning tool

nodes.label: Efficiency and time savings
nodes.grounding_span: it took less than 5 minutes to set up after struggling for over an hour

nodes.label: Fairness and equity in scheduling
nodes.grounding_span: create a fair and equitable schedule

nodes.label: Accuracy and error prevention in billing
nodes.grounding_span: there can be no mistakes or the claims will be rejected

nodes.label: Understanding and knowledge acquisition
nodes.grounding_span: It makes information extremely accessible, and is able to provide examples instantly

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for technical setup
nodes.grounding_span: The instructions it gave were flawless and it took less than 5 minutes

nodes.label: Cautious trust in AI
nodes.grounding_span: I will feed a few months worth of data if no issues have arisen which allows me to keep an eye on things

nodes.label: Hesitance toward AI for high-stakes billing
nodes.grounding_span: currently it is too vital to entrust to AI as there is too much nuance to the entries

nodes.label: Optimism about AI as future tool
nodes.grounding_span: I think I will be moving to use AI more in the future, especially as it keeps improving

nodes.label: Domain-specific calibration of AI use
nodes.grounding_span: If serious issues come up, I may still use AI to get some data analysis but I will also be double checking the information myself

nodes.label: Proactive learning and skill maintenance
nodes.grounding_span: if there's ever any technical issues where the AI isn't functioning properly, it is important to still know how to do things yourself
